name: RENAL ARTERY ANEURYSM

demographics.Location: R > L; 1st-order branch of main renal artery (usually)

distribution: R > L; 1st-order branch of main renal artery (usually)
discriminating_features: variable enhancement (depending on amount of thrombus)
saccular aneurysm close to vascular bifurcations, may calcify
multiple small aneurysms in interlobar branches near corticomedullary junction

general: variable enhancement (depending on amount of thrombus)
saccular aneurysm close to vascular bifurcations, may calcify
multiple small aneurysms in interlobar branches near corticomedullary junction
